out_of_scope_examples: Trip blocks, flight bookings, hotel itineraries (travel lane)
Reply-to-this-email nudges or social-coordination plans (email_triage lane)
Existing concert events on the calendar — leave-now / prep / post-event are calendar's lane
Speculative 'might like' suggestions for artists not named in the profile
Generic ticket-platform digests with no profile-named artist hit

surface_time_rules.sale_window_nudge: as soon as the sale-open email is processed (sale is live)
surface_time_rules.tickets_open_countdown: 2–6 hours before the announced sale-open time
surface_time_rules.festival_lineup_update: the day the lineup change email lands

trigger_requirements.must_combine: profile-named artist/festival/circuit + a real signal in the live slice (ticket-platform email, artist newsletter, calendar event, or profile-listed festival inside its 7–14-day prep window)
trigger_requirements.profile_alone_insufficient: Naming an artist in the profile is necessary but NOT sufficient. There has to be a concrete trigger in today's mailbox / calendar / festival window.

personas.fixture_summary: Today = Fri 2026-05-01. Mailbox: mom check-in (msg_mom_1), HR holiday FYI (msg_hr_1), Dad insurance forward (msg_dad_1). Calendar: Date Night Toit + recurring Indiranagar routines + outside-window meetings. ZERO ticket-platform emails. ZERO mentions of profile-named artists (Kendrick, Frank Ocean, Prateek Kuhad, Anuv Jain, AP Dhillon, FKJ, SZA, Diljit Dosanjh) anywhere in the slice or calendar. Profile bucket-list and top-artists exist but no live signal triggers any of them.
personas.expected_tasks_note: Silence is the only correct output. The events agent's trigger contract requires (profile-named artist OR profile-listed festival) AND (real email/calendar/festival-window signal). Profile alone is not a trigger. Bucket-list artists like Kendrick / Frank Ocean / AP Dhillon are not actionable until a real sale-open or announcement email lands.

expected_skips.summary: Do NOT reframe Dad's insurance renewal email as `Buy tickets ...` or any other event task. Insurance is finance lane; the email has no ticket / artist / venue content.
Do NOT reframe the HR public-holiday FYI as a discovery / event task. It is an FYI announcement with no ticket signal.
Do NOT generate any events task from Mom's relational check-in. No event signal; reply belongs to email_triage.

Do NOT emit `Buy tickets for Kendrick Lamar` / `Watch for Kendrick tour news` / `Save the date for Kendrick Asia tour` despite Kendrick being on Aditi's bucket list. No sale-open email landed; profile alone is not a trigger.
expected_skips.notes: Most tempting failure mode for this agent: profile names a high-emotion bucket-list artist, agent invents a task without a live signal.

expected_skips.summary: Do NOT emit any task about Frank Ocean. He's on Aditi's bucket list but no announcement email exists in the slice.
Do NOT emit `Buy tickets for AP Dhillon arena show` etc. The bucket-list entry is real but no concrete sale-open / announcement email exists.
Do NOT emit `Look for upcoming concerts on BookMyShow` or `Plan a concert outing this weekend`. No specific artist, no specific city, no concrete trigger — vague filler.

Do NOT reframe Sat pottery / Sun yoga / Sun brunch / Fri date-night as event-agent tasks. They are profile-stated routines; pottery/yoga are not concerts; date night is the calendar agent's lane if anything.

personas.fixture_summary: Onboarded today (2026-05-01) → BACKFILL. Calendar fixture empty. Mailbox slice: Sudipto bridge invite, Mitali breakfast email. Mailbox history (63 messages) has ZERO ticket-platform emails (BookMyShow / District / Insider) and ZERO mentions of profile-named artists (Tagore / Ravi Shankar / Vilayat Khan / Kishori Amonkar / Miles Davis / Coltrane / Beatles / Floyd) or festivals (Dover Lane).
personas.expected_tasks_note: Backfill with zero ticket-platform mail history → no patterns to act on, no upcoming-show events, no profile-festival inside window. Dover Lane Music Conference is December — outside the 7–14 day prep window. The two personal emails are coordination, not events.

expected_skips.summary: Do NOT reframe Sudipto's bridge invitation as a `Buy tickets for ...` or similar event task. Bridge at the Saturday Club is not a ticketed event; the email is social coordination owned by email_triage.
Do NOT reframe Mitali's Sunday breakfast email as an event task. Breakfast is food / social coordination; not a ticketed event.

Do NOT emit `Lineup update — Dover Lane Music Conference` or `Tickets open for Dover Lane`. Dover Lane is in December; today is May 1. Outside the 7–14-day prep window for festivals. Wait until ~10 days before.
Do NOT emit `Watch for European jazz festivals` or similar. Profile lists this as bucket-list but with no London/Europe trip in the live calendar and no announcement email, this is speculation.

Do NOT emit a preference_update that just restates the profile's stated artists or 'attends Dover Lane every year.' BACKFILL preference_updates must come from mailbox/calendar evidence the profile doesn't already capture; not from re-summarising the profile.

personas.fixture_summary: Steady-state (onboarded 2026-01-20). Calendar empty. Mailbox slice: 1 work email from Nilesh about FY25 audit. Mailbox history (44 messages) has ZERO ticket-platform mails. Profile is cricket-heavy: bucket list 'live match at Lord's or MCG'; London trip July 2026 already booked and includes a cricket match. No music-concert interests.
personas.expected_tasks_note: No live event signal. The cricket-match-in-London entry is already on the calendar / travel itinerary; that's calendar/travel's lane. No sale-open email for any cricket match in the live slice.

expected_skips.summary: Do NOT reframe Nilesh's audit email as an event task. Work coordination, not a ticketed event.
Do NOT emit `Buy tickets for ICC World Cup 2026` or any speculative cricket-tournament task. No sale-open email; profile alone is not a trigger.

Do NOT surface a `Buy tickets for London cricket match` task. The London trip + match is already booked and on the calendar. Repeating it is duplication; any pre-trip prep belongs to travel/calendar agents.

Do NOT emit a preference_update that restates 'user is a cricket fan' or 'user has a London trip booked.' Both are already in the profile; BACKFILL/STEADY-STATE preference_updates require new evidence from mail history, not a re-summary.

personas.fixture_summary: Onboarded today (2026-05-01) → BACKFILL. Empty calendar fixture, empty mailbox (0 messages), empty calendar.json. Profile note: Meera has not granted Gmail / Calendar access yet — assistant works profile-only. Profile bucket list includes BTS reunion, IU India show, Frank Ocean; 'Currently saving for' Anuv Jain Aria Tour Mumbai; Mood Indigo + KEM cultural fest are cheap-concert highlights.
personas.expected_tasks_note: Total silence is the only correct output. No mailbox to mine, no calendar events, no live signal. The profile names many high-emotion bucket-list items (BTS, IU, Anuv Jain, Frank Ocean) but the events agent's trigger contract requires a real signal in the live slice. Profile-only personas with no OAuth → 0 tasks AND 0 preference_updates.

expected_skips.summary: Do NOT emit `Buy tickets for Anuv Jain Mumbai` despite the profile saying she's actively saving for it. No sale-open email landed (mailbox is empty). Bucket-list + savings jar = NOT a trigger; an actual ticket-platform email is the trigger.
expected_skips.notes: Highest-temptation skip target for this persona — profile signals high intent, but the agent must wait for a real announcement email.

expected_skips.summary: Do NOT emit BTS / IU / Frank Ocean tasks. All bucket-list, none have a live signal.
Do NOT emit a Mood Indigo task today. Mood Indigo is in December; today is May 1 — far outside the 7–14-day festival prep window.
Do NOT emit preference_updates for a profile-only persona with no OAuth-granted mail/calendar to mine. Echoing 'user loves BTS' or 'user attends Mood Indigo' restates the profile — not a discovery.

evaluation_method.task_alignment: For each surfaced task, the LLM judge classifies it as: matches an expected_task (TP — there are none in this golden set), matches an expected_skip (skip violation — high-severity), or unexpected (plain FP). Matching is semantic: title + action + rationale should align with the expected summary. Skip targets enumerate the real-world failure modes (admin emails reframed, social emails reframed, speculative bucket-list tasks with no live signal, outside-window festival nudges, generic-platform browsing, profile-only-persona over-reach).
evaluation_method.lane_discipline_check: Skip targets explicitly cover: finance / dates / travel / food / email_triage / calendar lane leaks. The agent must NOT reframe insurance, birthdays, trip-blocks, food, replies, or routine calendar events as events tasks.
evaluation_method.speculation_check: The most distinctive failure mode for this agent is profile-without-signal speculation — emitting `Buy tickets for X bucket-list artist` or `Watch for X tour news` when the profile names an artist but the live slice has no email or calendar trigger. These skip targets are explicit per persona.
evaluation_method.outside_window_check: Festival prep lead window is 7–14 days. Mood Indigo / Dover Lane / Onam etc. fired in May for December events are skip violations.
evaluation_method.verb_prefix_check: The agent's prompt restricts action prefixes to `Buy tickets for `, `Tickets open `, `Lineup update — `. Any actual task whose action begins with `Watch for`, `Save the date`, `Look for`, `Plan`, `Suggest`, `Track`, etc. is at minimum a quality flag — call it out in `reasoning`.
evaluation_method.silence_correctness: When expected_tasks is empty (every persona in this golden set), zero actual tasks scores 1.0 silence. Each surfaced task is at least an unexpected FP, often a skip violation.
evaluation_method.preference_topic_coverage: Every persona has expected_preference_topics = []. The agent should NOT emit preference_updates that just restate the profile (echoes) or that drift into other lanes (Food / Bills / Travel / etc.). Profile-only personas with no mailbox to mine should emit zero updates.

metrics.task_recall: TP / (TP + FN); N/A when expected_tasks is empty
metrics.pref_coverage: topics_matched / total_expected_topics; N/A when topic list empty
metrics.silence_rate: 1.0 if expected_tasks=[] AND actual_tasks=[]; degrades with every surfaced task

evaluation_method.judge_prompt_hint: Tell the judge: 'The events agent's hardest property is resisting profile-without-signal speculation. A bucket-list entry is NOT a trigger — only a real email, calendar event, or profile-listed festival inside its 7–14-day prep window is a trigger. Bucket-list speculation, generic platform browsing, lane reframings, and outside-window festival nudges are all skip violations. Reward silence when the slice has no concrete trigger.'
